passages.passage_text:
Type 3 Finding a Week Day on the Basis of Another Week Day

In such questions, a week day is to be found out on the basis of some reference day of the week.

Important Concepts Regarding Days
(i) Yesterday = Today - 1 day
(ii) Tomorrow = Today + 1 day
(iii) Day after yesterday = Today
(iv) Day before yesterday = Today - 2 days
(v) Day after tomorrow = Today + 2 days
(vi) Day before tomorrow = Today
(vii) Day after the day before yesterday = (Yesterday - 1 day) + 1 day = Yesterday = Today - 1 day
(viii) Day before the day after tomorrow = (Tomorrow + 1 day) - 1 day = Tomorrow = Today + 1 day
(ix) Day before the day after yesterday = (Yesterday + 1 day) - 1 day = Yesterday = Today - 1 day
(x) Day after the day before tomorrow = (Tomorrow - 1 day) + 1 day = Tomorrow = Today + 1 day

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: 2 days before yesterday was Friday, then what day of the week will be day after tomorrow?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If a day before yesterday was Thursday, then when will Sunday fall?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If day after tomorrow is Tuesday, then what day of the week will it be on 2 days after the day after tomorrow?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If day before yesterday was Thursday, then when will be the Monday?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If a day before yesterday was Wednesday, then when will Sunday fall?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Tuesday falls 3 days after today, then what day of the week was it on 4 days before yesterday?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Thursday falls 2 days after tomorrow, then what day of the week was it on three days before yesterday?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If day after tomorrow is Sunday, then what day of the week was it on day before yesterday?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If a day before yesterday was Tuesday, then what day of the week will it be on a day after tomorrow?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If day before yesterday was Saturday, then what day of the week will it be after tomorrow?
